title: How do Angels get special abilities
display_title: How do Angels get special abilities
wikitext:
[]: How do Angels get special abilities?             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:07 pm Not sure whether this is the right forum or not, Anyway, I've just been wondering, and a bit curious as well, you see, Ritsuko said that Angels were composed of almost of the same matter, well, if that's the case, how do Angels actually produce and implement their special abilities? eg: Sachiel's ray beam, and Ramiel's energy beam. How can they actually use their weapons? How do they do it?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:09 pm quantum magic

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:14 pm BrikHaus wrote: quantum magic

[]: Quantum Magic's Whatever You Want It to Be!             Quote Post by TriLink » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:15 pm I'm not entirely sure, but doesn't Ritsuko say the Angels are made up of some unknown material? Or maybe I just imagined that, I dunno. Er, on second thought, Quantum Magic sounds good to me...

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:30 pm Angels are made from Particle Wave Matter, almost like solid light. Their powers of self propulsion and energy all stem from their S2 Organ. Quantum magic is something else entirely.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:33 pm How Sachiel, Zeruel and the Evas set off cross-shaped explosions has never been explained. Place it to "Pointless religious symbolism" and "Giant Monsters with Laser Eyes". If I were designing those Angels, I'd probably have the eyes used as targeting lasers, while "Angel Bombs" launched from the wings(Formed momentarily as a flaring red crucifix) would fly in the air like a mortar and hit, forming plasma in a cross-shaped magnetic field. Booooooom!!!! Ramiel, however, does have a known mechanism for that particle ray: In Episode 05 and 06, the screen shows "Inner Toroidal Reactor" operating, so he uses some sort of nuclear reactor to power up that fearsome ray of his. Wow! (That's one of the things I appreciate about Ramiel. She's more hi-tech than religious)

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:43 pm The Angel's abilities are seemingly explained in the shows "in universe logic", by two separate components of their bodies. The first is their "Particle-Wave matter" structure (PWM), which is apparently what explains their metamorphic abilities. The second is their "S^2 Organs/Engines". Apparently standing for Super Solenoid, the S^2 organs, which apparently reside in the Angel's cores, are what provides the energy needed to power the Angels fantastic abilities. The Evangelions are apparently at least partially composed of PWM. However they lack any S^2 organs, and hence must use the umbilical cables for power. Nerv have apparently no S^2 samples at all until they recover some from Shamshel in Episode #05.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:55 pm Angels are composed of Particle-wave matter It's not quite energy, it's not quite matter, it's poorly understood by even Ritsuko's science. Meanwhile, the direct source of their power is that they have S^2 Engines (Super-Solenoid Engines) That's the source of their "power", but the source of their "abilities" is just that humans benefited from the Tree of Knowledge (benefits of sentience) while the Angels benefited from the Tree of Life (awesome superpowers)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:57 pm anno gave them their powers

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 12, 2007 8:57 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: BrikHaus wrote: quantum magic

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Oct 12, 2007 9:06 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: If we don't already have one, I think we really ought to have an entry in the Evapedia on Quantum Magic.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Oct 12, 2007 10:18 pm Come on guys the answer is obvious, PLOT DEVICE!

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Oct 12, 2007 10:26 pm The theory I used to explain why angels may have different genders in their 2nd form in the genders of non lillum persons topic would also explain why angels have different abilities. My theory is that while the default form may have something like a human gender (this doesn't rule out hermaphroditism , hermaphrodites are human too) the secondery form may have a different gender or no gender at all depending on the angel. Here's my reasoning behind that. The default form of the angels seems to be something like the evas, when unit 01 was born it was in its default form despite coming from lillith who looks quite different. Lillith is probably in her secondery form when this happens which is the reason for the disimilarity. Adam on the other hand seems to be in the default form of the angels and has not picked a secondery form for whatever reason. Adam gave birth in a relitively conventional way laying eggs. But notice that Lillith gave birth differently, everything born from lillith seems to diffuse from her body in an almost asexual sort of way. In her default form Lillith may give birth simialer to the way Adam does, but not in this form. This leads me to believe that due to the multiple forms, the angels can and in some cases do have multiple genders depending on what the secondery form is.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Oct 13, 2007 2:52 am EM, I can't lurk all the time, besides I'm going onto this forum on all my free time. I was up all this morning searching around this site. I don't have as much free time as you have, nor nowhere near as much so I can design a forum. Anyways, this is starting to get off-topic a bit. But there hasn't been a thread on the Angels' abilities have there? Quantum Magic, gotcha, other stuff it's...a bit... :? :shock: By the way, it was BrikHaus that came up with Quantum Magic. I got confused at that. Eh, I'm asking one question here and then people start going onto...you know, stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Sat Oct 13, 2007 2:56 am For a proper explanation of quantum magic/physics/mechanics, see here: http://evageeks.org/FGP/Rei%27s_Ghostly_Appearances_and_Quantum_Mechanics

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Oct 13, 2007 3:25 am They're "God humans", do they really need a logical reason beyond that?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Oct 13, 2007 10:51 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Come on guys the answer is obvious, PLOT DEVICE!

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Oct 13, 2007 2:56 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Come on guys the answer is obvious, PLOT DEVICE!

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Oct 13, 2007 5:17 pm DatDude wrote: Welcome to the world of being DatDude

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Oct 14, 2007 8:36 am Combination of leveling up and using T echnical M achines. ......Sorry.
